description_long: This is a dark teal teapot with a simple, geometric design and a matte finish. The body is polygonal and slightly rounded, with a wide, flat lid topped by a small, rounded knob. The spout is long, slender, and gently curves outward from the body, while the handle is thick, angular, and forms a broad loop opposite the spout. The teapot appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. Its overall appearance is utilitarian and modern, suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban settings.
description: A dark teal, polygonal teapot with a curved spout, thick loop handle, and a flat lid with a knob. The design is simple, matte, and modern.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from a side angle, showing the curved spout on the right and the thick loop handle on the left.
description_view_1: The teapot is viewed head-on from the spout side, with the spout centered and the lid knob visible on top.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the handle on the right and the spout on the left, both extending from the polygonal body.
description_view_3: The teapot is viewed directly from the handle side, with the handle centered and the lid knob visible on top.
attribute_spout_orientation: Curved, angled slightly upward, positioned at the front of the main body.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, angular loop handle attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, with a broad ergonomic grip.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; flat with a small, rounded knob in the center.
